title: A Mexican Cartel Leader and Ex-Partner to El Mencho Pleads Guilty in U.S.
summary_full: Erick Valencia Salazar, a co-founder of one of Mexico’s deadliest gangs, faces 10 years to life in prison after making a plea deal in a Washington court.
summary_public: Erick Valencia Salazar, a co-founder of one of Mexico’s deadliest gangs, faces 10 years to life in prison after making a plea deal in a Washington court.
